name: Chocolate Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
Cream butter, shortening, and sugar together in mixing bowl until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Blend in vanilla. Sift flour, cocoa, salt, and baking powder together; add to creamed mixture alternately with milk, beginning and ending with the sifted dry ingredients. Mix well after each addition. Spoon batter into prepared pan. Bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted one inch from the edge comes out clean. Cool in pan for 10 minutes; turn out onto wire rack and cool completely.
